== Notes for [[Item:Q57898|Q57898]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:N8YY-XLQ : 28 July 2015), Francisco Alfonso de Sossa in entry for Lope de Sossa, 1612. ... Name: '''Lope de Sossa'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''02 Dec 1612'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano (Centro), , Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Male; Father's Name: Francisco Alfonso de Sossa; Mother's Name: Luisa de Ribera Y Avendano

See a '''photograph of Lope's original Baptism Record''' in his profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADC354A01EFBBFA9822EF79916CA50B
geni:6000000068152046848

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
